blocks.body: Passive in Key Tenses — an overview of the passive state in the main tenses: Present/Past Continuous (is being done), Present Perfect (has been done), Future (will be done).

{ "title": "10. Short summary", "items": [ "Continuous Passive: be + being + V3 — action in process (is/was being done).", "Perfect Passive: have/had + been + V3 — completed action (has/had been done).", "Future Simple Passive: will + be + V3 — future action (will be done).", "Future Perfect Passive: will have + been + V3 - rarely used.", "The Perfect Continuous and some complex tenses do NOT have a passive form.", "The be component changes over time, while V3 remains the same." ] }
